values.value: [{"fieldApiName":"CloseDate","label":"Close Date","type":"date","required":true,"columnSize":"1-of-3"},{"fieldApiName":"StageName","label":"Stage","required":true,"columnSize":"1-of-3"},{"fieldApiName":"Program_Type__c","label":"Program Type","required":true,"columnSize":"1-of-3"},{"fieldApiName":"LeadSource","label":"Lead Source","required":true,"columnSize":"1-of-2"},{"fieldApiName":"Opportunity__c","label":"Opportunity Source","required":true,"controllingFieldApiName":"LeadSource","columnSize":"1-of-2"},{"fieldApiName":"Owner__c","label":"Opportunity Owner","required":true,"columnSize":"1-of-2"},{"fieldApiName":"Type","label":"Type","required":false,"columnSize":"1-of-2"},{"fieldApiName":"NextStep","label":"Next Step","type":"text","required":false,"columnSize":"1-of-1"},{"fieldApiName":"Next_Step_Date__c","label":"Next Step Date","type":"date","required":false,"columnSize":"1-of-3"},{"fieldApiName":"Documents_Ready__c","label":"Are You Ready to Send Documents for Onboarding?","type":"picklist","picklistValues":["Yes","No"],"required":true,"columnSize":"1-of-2"}]
